author: Julian Quick
name: PR #1738 + PreQuant TTT LR=1e-3 + Unfrozen (freeze_blocks=0)
technique_summary: PR #1738 (alertcat) base unchanged. Two pre-quant TTT hyperparameters retuned via os.environ.setdefault prepended to train_gpt.py: PREQUANT_TTT_LR 5e-4 -> 1e-3 (TTT was undertuned - epoch-21 TTT loss still descending at default LR), PREQUANT_TTT_FREEZE_BLOCKS 2 -> 0 (allow full model to adapt during the 21-epoch pre-quant TTT). The packed train_gpt.py blob also contains a small FlashAttention-3 compatibility patch (q/k/v .to(bf16) cast before flash_attn_3_func) because PR #1738's packed blob crashes on pytorch 2.5.1 without it; behaviorally identical on pytorch 2.9.1. Same architecture, tokenizer, main training.

attribution.ttt_retune: this PR (@kilojoules) - PREQUANT_TTT_LR=1e-3 + PREQUANT_TTT_FREEZE_BLOCKS=0 + FA3 bf16 cast for pytorch 2.5.1 compatibility
